title: eryngium vaseyi
intro: Eryngium vaseyi, also known as Vasey's eryngo, is a flowering plant species within the family Apiaceae. It is primarily found in the western United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Eryngium vaseyi, often made into teas or infusions, are used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation in the body.
